evals.expected_output: Identifies deprecated Mass and ChurchEvent imports and types. Notes that gate pattern is compliant. Suggests replacing Mass with MassSchedule and ChurchEvent with Celebration.

evals.prompt: Does this route follow the new domain model? apps/src/routes/admin/settings/misa/
